case_title: AREVALO, ELY DALIA VS ALONZO, FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AREVALO, ELY DALIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALONZO, FRANCISCO $525.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $546.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF AREVALO, ELY DALIA
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ALONZO, FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT AREVALO, ELY DALIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $525.00 FILED BY AREVALO, ELY DALIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALONZO, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $500.00 FILED BY ALONZO, FRANCISCO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AREVALO, ELY DALIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
